questionHtml:
What feature of eukaryotic chromosomes distinguishes them from the chromosomes of prokaryotes?

A. Histone proteins

B. Circular DNA

C. Double-stranded DNA molecules

D. Multiple genes along the length of each chromosome

meta.title: What feature of eukaryotic chromosomes distinguishes them from the chromosomes of prokaryotes? A. Histone proteins B. Circular DNA C. Double-stranded DNA molecules D. Multiple gene
